title: justicia brevifolia
intro: Justicia brevifolia, also known as the "Mexican honeysuckle", is a flowering plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia brevifolia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. The plant is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent to extract its active compounds.
